mapper.select: select user_id as userId, user_name as userName, password as password, status as status, remark as remark from t_business_user_info t where t.user_name = #{userName}

select user_id as userId, user_name as userName, password as password, status as status, remark as remark from t_business_user_info t
instr(t.user_name, #{userName}) > 0
mapper.insert: insert into t_business_user_info( user_id, user_name, password, status, remark ) values(#{userId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{status}, #{remark})
